data.title: ticket list --format=llm omits parent_id and other fields present in default format
data.description:
## Bug Description

The `ticket list --format=llm` output omits `parent_id` (and potentially other fields) that are present in the default JSON format. The LLM format maps fields to shortened keys but appears to selectively include only a subset.

## Observed Behavior

Default format includes: `ticket_id`, `ticket_type`, `title`, `status`, `author`, `created_at`, `env_id`, `parent_id`, `priority`, `assignee`, `description`, `tags`, `comments`, `deps`, `bridge_alerts`, `reverts`.

LLM format includes only: `id`, `t`, `ttl`, `st`, `au`, `pr`, `asn`, `desc`. Missing at minimum: `parent_id`, `created_at`, `env_id`, `tags`, `comments`, `deps`, `bridge_alerts`, `reverts`.

## Expected Behavior

The LLM format should include all fields from the default format (with shortened keys). At minimum, `parent_id` is critical for querying ticket hierarchies without falling back to the verbose default format.

## Reproduction Steps

1. Run `.claude/scripts/dso ticket list --format=llm`
2. Compare keys to `.claude/scripts/dso ticket list` (default format)
3. Note missing fields
